svg.title: epc-network-analytics architecture with real dbt layers
svg.desc: Pipeline: Control Plane generator, GCS bronze (staging to processed), Spark on Dataproc, GCS silver (staging to processed), BigQuery, dbt staging, intermediate, marts (dims, incremental facts and rpt_epc_networks), Looker Studio, orchestrated by Kestra, with Terraform provisioning GCS and BigQuery.
